title: MOKANI 3 Rolls Nano Double Sided Adhesive Tape, 5M/16.4FT Multifunctional Reusable Washable Traceless Transparent Gel Tape, Wall Sticky Strips for Kitchen, Party, Paste Photos Posters, Carpet Fixing
features: 【SIZE】: Each Roll 5M length; Width: 2CM; Thickness: 1MM. Easily cut it to the size you need. It is also stretchy and flexible.

【Strong Adhesive Strength】: You can stick it to car or wall to hold decorations firmly. It can hold items up to 1 KG (2.2 LBS) on smooth surfaces. Please don’t use this tape on powder wall, wet surfaces, or uneven surfaces. Because of its strong adhesive strength, it is not suitable for whitewashed walls, which may cause damage on it.
【Reusable】: Nano tape is specially made and can be reused: Rinse it and wash the dirt away, air-dry or use a hair dryer to dry, then re-stick it to the place you want.
【Leave no marks】: This double-sided tape can stick to almost any kind of smooth surfaces, easy to disassemble without damaging them, so you can arbitrarily paste anything.
【Package Includes】: 3 Pack Nano Tapes. If you want to decorate your party and don’t want to get stain on walls, try this one.
description: Product Description Double Sided Tape Heavy Duty Simple To Use Step 1: Clean the surface and the items you want to stick on the surface. Step 2: Cut the tape to a desired length. Step 3: Peeling the outer film off. Step 4: Press item on surface for 20 seconds. Product Features Easy to cut Cut to any desired size. Strong Adhesion It can hold things up to 1kg (2.2 lbs) on a smooth surface No residue No sticky residue as there is no glue. Reusable and washable The stains on the tape can be cleaned with water and then dried with a hair dryer to be reused. What should be careful before use? To ensure that surface is clean and dry. Can this double sided tape be used on painted walls? Not recommended for use on rough surfaces such as powder, paint, greasy and damp walls to avoid damage. Can it be reused? For repetitive use, just wash it with water and dry to refresh stickiness.
